subject: Special Offer: Try a Times Digital Subscription for Less
body:
Act Now to Take Advantage of this Special Offer

------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT8JmIB81HXJB871CcAAwENcIh/viwb?t_params=CAMPAIGN_CODE%3D49FQ8%26EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

TRY THE TIMES DIGITAL EXPERIENCE FOR LESS
$5 FOR YOUR FIRST 12 WEEKS

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT8JmIB81HXJB871CcAAwENcIh/sub01t

-----------------------------------------------------------------

Dear NYTimes.com Reader, 

The New York Times satisfies your need to know by connecting 
you to award-winning journalism, fresh perspectives and 
innovative multimedia; anytime, anywhere. Now, try unlimited 
access to all this and more: just $5 for your first 12 weeks.* 

>From summer recipes to breaking news from around the world, 
keep up with all the latest on your computer, smartphone or 
tablet. With a Times Digital Subscription, you no longer have 
to limit yourself to 10 articles a month. Plus, enjoy even 
more free benefits available only to subscribers -- like the 
new NYT Now app, which gives you quick access to top news 
stories. You'll also get the new NYT Opinion app, giving you 
a direct connection to our renowned columnists and fresh voices 
from around the globe. 

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE
OF THIS SPECIAL OFFER 

This offer is only available to select NYTimes.com readers. 
Try unlimited digital access to The New York Times for just 
$5 for your first 12 weeks, and see why The Times experience 
keeps you informed and inspired, everywhere life takes you.

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT8JmIB81HXJB871CcAAwENcIh/sub02t

*****

$5 FOR YOUR FIRST 12 WEEKS

Unlimited access to:

-- Award-winning journalism

-- Expert commentary

-- Innovative multimedia

-- Best-in-class mobile apps

REDEEM SPECIAL OFFER:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT8JmIB81HXJB871CcAAwENcIh/sub03t

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user of 
The New York Times. 

*Promotional offers for new subscribers only. Smartphone and 
tablet apps are not supported on all devices. New York Times
digital subscriptions do not include e-reader editions, Times 
Premier content or digital versions of The New York Times 
Crossword. Other restrictions and taxes may apply. 

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBT8JmIB81HXJB871CcAAwENcIh/nyt

body_html:
Try The Times Digital Experience for Less
Dear NYTimes.com Reader,

The New York Times satisfies your need to know by connecting you to award-winning journalism, fresh perspectives and innovative multimedia; anytime, anywhere. Now, try unlimited access to all this and more: just $5 for your first 12 weeks.*

>From summer recipes to breaking news from around the world, keep up with all the latest on your computer, smartphone or tablet. With a Times Digital Subscription, you no longer have to limit yourself to 10 articles a month. Plus, enjoy even more free benefits available only to subscribers — like the new NYT Now app, which gives you quick access to top news stories. You’ll also get the new NYT Opinion app, giving you a direct connection to our renowned columnists and fresh voices from around the globe.

ACT NOW TO TAKE ADVANTAGE
OF THIS SPECIAL OFFER

This offer is only available to select NYTimes.com readers. Try unlimited digital access to The New York Times for just $5 for your first 12 weeks, and see why The Times experience keeps you informed and inspired, everywhere life takes you.


You received this email because you are a registered user of The New York Times.

*Promotional offers for new subscribers only. Smartphone and tablet apps are not supported on all devices. New York Times digital subscriptions do not include e-reader editions, Times Premier content or digital versions of The New York Times Crossword. Other restrictions and taxes may apply.

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.
